summary: Completed comprehensive testing of PPL Board IPL prediction app. All backend APIs working correctly, frontend loads properly with dark theme, navigation functional. CricAPI returning empty matches due to rate limiting as expected.
passed_tests: Backend API /api/ health check returns PPL Board response
Backend API /api/matches/live returns valid JSON with matches array
Backend API /api/matches/fixtures returns valid JSON with fixtures array
WebSocket endpoint /api/ws/test-match accepts connections and responds to PING
Frontend loads at root / with PPL Board heading visible
Frontend navigation between MATCHES, LIVE, ANALYSIS tabs works
Frontend shows empty state when no matches available
Frontend dark theme is properly applied (dark backgrounds)
Analysis page loads and shows correct layout
Match selector tabs (live, upcoming, completed) work correctly
